data.name: Role-specific experience
data.description: Content, CTAs, and framing fully tailored to the classified role for the relevant solution category. Three-axis personalization activates if buying job confidence is KNOWN or INFERRED.

data.name: Role-influenced experience
data.description: Content leans toward the classified role but retains safe fallback elements. No highly role-specific CTAs. Three-axis activates only if buying job confidence is KNOWN (not INFERRED).

data.name: Solution-interest experience
data.trigger: Role confidence = LOW or UNKNOWN with identified solution interest
data.description: Content organised by solution category without role-specific framing. No role assumptions made. Serving the most probable content for the solution area based on account-level signals.

data.name: Account-level experience
data.trigger: TAL account identified — no solution interest or role signal
data.description: Personalised by industry, company size, or account attributes only. No solution or role assumptions.

pending_solution_fallback.description: When a visitor's solution interest maps to a TITLE_ROLE_MAP entry with coverage_status: 'pending', fall back to the champion_typical_title and economic_buyer_typical_title anchor titles defined in §1c SOLUTIONS for firmographic matching. Confidence ceiling remains MEDIUM. Do not apply firmographic_confirmation_bonus.
pending_solution_fallback.logging_requirement: Flag all pending-solution fallback events with solution_key and visitor_id for coverage gap tracking.

escalation_threshold.description: High fallback volume for a pending solution signals it should be prioritized for coverage completion.
escalation_threshold.calibration_note: This threshold (50 events / 7 days) is a starting hypothesis — it was set without baseline data and must be tuned in the first sprint cycle after deployment. For high-volume solutions (agent_platform, security_operations), this may fire in week 1 and produce alert fatigue. For low-volume solutions, it may never fire. The build session must capture fallback event volume per solution_key from day one to enable calibration.

data.name: Default brand experience
data.description: Standard kalder.com experience with no personalisation. Exploratory CTAs only.
